name: odontos-landing
description: Static landing page build and validation scripts

scripts.minify:html: html-minifier-terser --collapse-whitespace --remove-comments --remove-redundant-attributes --remove-script-type-attributes --remove-style-link-type-attributes --minify-css true --minify-js true -o dist/index.html index.html && html-minifier-terser --collapse-whitespace --remove-comments --remove-redundant-attributes --remove-script-type-attributes --remove-style-link-type-attributes --minify-css true --minify-js true -o dist/privacy-policy.html privacy-policy.html
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run prepare:dist && npm run minify:css && npm run minify:js && npm run minify:html && npm run copy:assets && npm run copy:static
